name: White Chocolate Icing Bswn00a
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the white chocolate in the top of a double boiler.
2. Stir the flour into the melted chocolate.
3. Add the milk gradually and blend well.
4. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until very thick.
5. Allow to cool completely.
6. In a large bowl, beat the sugar, butter, and vanilla until light and fluffy.
7. Gradually add the cooled chocolate mixture and beat until the icing reaches the consistency of whipped cream.
8. This will frost tops and sides of 2-9 inch layers.
